subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: Love, love, love. Love attracts the hearts, love captivates the souls. Even these massive globes revolve through the power of gravity
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبت ، محبت ، محبت ، محبت جاذب قلوب است محبت جالب نفوس است . حتی این کرات جسیمه
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @one universal law; attractive power of love, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
